subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Smith, spoken on 1912-06-19
subcodes.first_line: You must always be happy. You must associate with joyous and happy people
subcodes.first_line_orig: تو یاید همیشه مسرور باشی و با اهل انبساط و سرور محشور و با خلاق رحمانی متخلق
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @stories; anecdotes, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
